analysis: Identity Risk Scoring and Blast-Radius Analytics

methodology.formula: Residual Risk = (Likelihood x Impact) x (1 - Control Effectiveness/5) + Blast Radius Adjustment

risk_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
risk_register.subject: svc_backup
risk_register.risk_description: High-privilege service account can reach a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
risk_register.subject: svc_backup
risk_register.risk_description: High-privilege service account can reach a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.risk_title: Privilege concentration across multiple high-value assets
risk_register.subject: svc_backup
risk_register.risk_description: Privilege concentration expands potential blast radius across multiple high-value assets.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Reduce privilege concentration, separate administrative duties, and validate whether access can be scoped by system or role.

risk_register.risk_title: Privilege concentration across multiple high-value assets
risk_register.subject: Server Admins
risk_register.risk_description: Privilege concentration expands potential blast radius across multiple high-value assets.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Reduce privilege concentration, separate administrative duties, and validate whether access can be scoped by system or role.

risk_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
risk_register.subject: svc_reporting
risk_register.risk_description: High-privilege service account can reach a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.subject: svc_reporting
risk_register.risk_description: Dormant privileged identity retains elevated capability.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Validate business need, disable or remove elevated access, and retain review evidence.

risk_register.subject: Domain Admins
risk_register.risk_description: Administrative path exists to a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.subject: legacy.admin
risk_register.risk_description: Dormant privileged identity retains elevated capability.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Validate business need, disable or remove elevated access, and retain review evidence.

risk_register.subject: Server Admins
risk_register.risk_description: Administrative path exists to a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.subject: Server Admins
risk_register.risk_description: Administrative path exists to a high-value or critical asset.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.

risk_register.subject: svc_reporting
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Assign a business and technical owner, validate purpose, rotate credentials, and reduce privileges.

risk_register.risk_title: Delegated support access combined with active managed-asset session
risk_register.subject: sam.adams
risk_register.risk_description: Delegated support access and active endpoint session create potential privilege-abuse conditions.
risk_register.treatment_recommendation: Review delegated rights, session monitoring, endpoint administrative controls, and separation-of-duties requirements.
